calendar.matters:
ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Phyllis Berenson appearing via zoom for and with Madeline Pardini (executor) appearing person.

Mrs. Berenson stated that she paid the $250.00 sanctions yesterday. Mrs. Pardini stated that her brother had access to the account and jumped the gun and distributed funds, that since then the funds have been moved back to the estate. Order to show cause is ordered off calendar. First and final report of executor on waiver if account etc., is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that an order to appear was issued to Phyllis Berenson. The Court is imposing sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Phyllis Berenson for failure to appear today and for failure to appear on February 21, 2023. The order to appear/order to show cause is continued to June 06, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

***After hearing (04/10/2023); after consideration by the Court only the order to appear is continued to June 06, 2023.***

Judge: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estateq
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Continued To Apr-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor Madeline Pardini and to the Attorney Phyllis G. Berenson to appear on April 5, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, why a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed, and to show why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 to each the attorney, and on the executor should not be imposed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date. The court noted that the other beneficiary has a right to know why this estate is still open.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Lee. Not reported.
